common.made_by: Made with ☕️ and 🧬️ by Armağan Gök

category.description: Categories help you organize your habits and track progress in specific areas of your life. You can select multiple categories.
category.title: Select categories for your habit

color.preview: Your habit will look like this
color.title: Choose a color for your habit

description.description: This step is optional. You can add more details about your habit, why it's important to you, or any specific goals you have.
description.title: Tell us more about this habit

difficulty.difficult_description: Challenging habits requiring significant effort and commitment (e.g., intense workouts, learning new skills)
difficulty.easy_description: Straightforward habits with low physical or mental effort (e.g., making bed, brushing teeth)
difficulty.info: We use a research‑based model to estimate how long it takes for this habit to become automatic. Easier habits get shorter timelines, while more challenging habits require longer ones. Your consistency can accelerate the timeline.
difficulty.moderate_description: Habits requiring moderate effort and planning (e.g., reading, light exercise)
difficulty.question: How challenging does this habit feel? We’ll tailor the estimated formation time based on your choice.
difficulty.title: Difficulty
difficulty.very_difficult_description: Very demanding habits requiring high effort, time, and mental strength (e.g., major lifestyle changes)
difficulty.very_easy_description: Simple habits that require minimal effort and time (e.g., drinking water, taking vitamins)

emoji.description: Choose an emoji that represents your habit. This will help you quickly identify it in your habit list.
emoji.title: Pick an emoji for your habit

habit_name.description: Choose a clear, specific name for your habit. For example: "Drink 8 glasses of water" instead of just "Stay hydrated".
habit_name.title: What habit would you like to build?

reminder.completion_time_description: Set a time when you typically complete this habit. This will be displayed on the main page and is separate from reminders.
reminder.daily_target_footer: How many times do you want to complete this habit each day?
reminder.description: Reminders are optional but highly recommended. They help you stay consistent by notifying you when it's time to complete your habit.
reminder.title: Reminder for your habit

step_subtitles.category: Which category does this habit belong to?
step_subtitles.color: Choose a color for your habit
step_subtitles.description: Tell us more about this habit (optional)
step_subtitles.difficulty: How difficult is this habit to build?
step_subtitles.emoji: Pick an icon that represents your habit
step_subtitles.habit_name: What habit would you like to build?
step_subtitles.reminder: When would you like to be reminded?

csv_service.missing_required_columns: CSV file is missing required columns (id, name)

edit_habit.difficulty_description: Choose the difficulty level that best matches your habit
edit_habit.emoji_description: Choose an emoji that represents your habit
edit_habit.habit_description_description: Add details about your habit to stay motivated
edit_habit.habit_name_description: Give your habit a clear, memorable name

habit.calendar_tap_info: Tap on dates to mark or unmark completion

habit_category.category_options_message: What would you like to do with '{{categoryName}}'?
habit_category.enter_category_name: Enter a name for your category
habit_category.title: Habit Category

habit_detail.achievement_consistency_description: You're performing at {{percentage}}% of your best streak!
habit_detail.achievement_probability_description: You're {{percentage}}% through building this habit. The neural pathways are strengthening!
habit_detail.achievement_weekend_description: You maintain great consistency even on weekends!
habit_detail.achievement_weekly_description: You've missed {{days}} days this week. Tomorrow is a fresh start!
habit_detail.archive_confirmation: Are you sure you want to archive '{{habitName}}'?
habit_detail.archive_info: You can restore it later from the archived habits section.
habit_detail.formation_probability_description: The Formation Probability shows how likely your habit is to become automatic based on your current completion rate. Higher probabilities mean your habit is more likely to stick permanently.
habit_detail.formation_probability_details: This probability is calculated using your consistency patterns and completion rate. Research shows it takes an average of 66 days of regular practice for a habit to become automatic.
habit_detail.heatmap_no_data: No data available yet. Start tracking your habit to see the heatmap!
habit_detail.heatmap_stats_description: {{days}} days completed in the last year
habit_detail.quote_aristotle: Excellence is not a single act, but a habit. You are not what you do once in a while; you are what you do consistently.
habit_detail.quote_collier: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
habit_detail.quote_lao_tzu: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
habit_detail.quote_twain: The secret to getting ahead is getting started.

home.long_press_to_move: Long press to move • Tap for details
home.tap_a_habit_to_start_connecting: Tap a habit to start connecting

membership_info.change_plan_desc: Click to change your subscription plan
membership_info.description: Tap to see your membership information
membership_info.title: Membership Info

achievement.first_habit_message: Great job! You completed your first habit in the onboarding!

cloud_sync.description: Your habits are securely synced across all your devices. Never lose your progress even if you switch devices.
cloud_sync.title: Cloud Sync

customizable.description: Make HabitForm truly yours. Choose colors, themes, and layouts that match your personality and keep you engaged.
customizable.title: Customizable

data_management.description: Export your habits data to CSV files for backup or transfer to another device.
data_management.title: Data Management

goal_setting.description: Science‑based planning that adapts to difficulty: easier habits form faster, harder ones take longer—keeping goals realistic.
goal_setting.title: Goal Setting

habit_archive.description: Keep your progress history safe and organized. View past achievements and restart habits whenever you're ready.
habit_archive.title: Habit Archive

habit_map.description: Visualize your habit network and see how habits connect. Build chains of related habits and understand the relationships that make your routine stronger.
habit_map.title: Habit Map

habit_probability.description: See exactly how likely you are to succeed with each habit. Get personalized insights that help you stay motivated and build lasting habits.
habit_probability.title: Habit Probability

home_widget.description: Track your habits without opening the app. Complete your daily goals directly from your iPhone home screen in seconds.

empty_state.create_habit_hint: Create a habit in the app to see it here

home_widget.title: Home Widget

widget_config.grid_description: View your habit progress over the last 60 days in a compact grid
widget_config.large_description: GitHub-style heatmap showing your habit completion over time
widget_config.medium_description: View your habit progress over the last 7 days
widget_config.small_description: Track your daily habits with streak counter

probability_rate.description: Alışkanlık oluşum ilerlemenizi akıllı içgörülerle takip edin. Alışkanlıklarınızın kalıcı hale gelmesine ne kadar yakın olduğunuzu görün.
probability_rate.title: Alışkanlık Oluşum Oranı

share_habits.description: Celebrate your wins with friends and family. Share beautiful progress images that inspire others and keep you accountable.
share_habits.title: Share Habits

smart_tracking.description: Alışkanlıklarınızı akıllı hatırlatıcılar ve ilerleme görselleştirmesi ile takip edin. Serilerinizin büyümesini görün ve her dönüm noktasını kutlayın.
smart_tracking.title: Akıllı Alışkanlık Takibi

sub_habits.description: Karmaşık alışkanlıkları daha küçük, yönetilebilir alt alışkanlıklara ayırın. Ana alışkanlığınızı mikro eylemlerle adım adım inşa edin.
sub_habits.title: Alt Alışkanlık Sistemi

app_features.subtitle: Our most advanced features for our most dedicated users
app_features.title: HabitForm's Unique Features

bad_habits.description: Identify what holds you back and replace it with positive alternatives.
bad_habits.title: Replace Bad Habits

become_person.aristotleHabitQuote: Excellence is not a single act, but a habit. You are what you do consistently.
become_person.title: Become Who You Want to Be

patience.description: Habits take time to form. Stay patient and trust the process.
patience.title: Patience Pays Off

routine.description: Consistency is key. Create a routine that works for you and watch your habits flourish.
routine.title: Build Your Routine

small_steps.description: Every big change starts with a single step. Build lasting habits one day at a time.
small_steps.title: Small Steps

welcome.journey_begins: Every journey begins with a single step.
welcome.try_tapping: Try tapping on the habit card

rating.description: To help us reach more people who need help building better habits, would you give our app a review?
rating.feedback_message: Your feedback helps us improve HabitForm and reach more people who need help building better habits.
rating.rate_message: Thank you for your interest in rating HabitForm! You can rate us on the App Store or Google Play Store.
rating.title:
You've just discovered
HabitForm's unique features

reward_rating.description: Rate how enjoyable this completion felt. This helps us understand your habit formation better.
reward_rating.title: How did you feel?

paywall.headline:
We become
what we repeatedly do.
paywall.testimonial_1_comment: HabitForm Pro completely transformed my daily routine. I've built 5 new habits in just 2 months!
paywall.testimonial_2_comment: The statistics and insights are incredible. I can see exactly how I'm progressing every day.
paywall.testimonial_3_comment: Finally, an app that actually helps me stick to my goals. The reminders are perfectly timed.
paywall.title: HabitForm Pro

permissions.storage_permission_message: HabitForm needs storage permission to import and export your habit data.
permissions.storage_permission_settings_message: HabitForm needs storage permission to import and export your habit data. Please enable it in your device settings.

purchase_dialog.pro_required_message: Unlock HabitForm Pro to access this and many other pro features!
purchase_dialog.pro_required_title: You need pro to unlock this feature

reminder.habit_reminder_message: Don't forget to complete your habit!

reminder_widgets.enable_notifications_message: To set reminders, please enable notifications in settings.
reminder_widgets.multiple_times_tip: Perfect for habits like "Drink Water" - set reminders at 8 AM, 2 PM, and 8 PM
reminder_widgets.tap_add_another_time: Tap "Add another time" below to get started

settings.data_management_description: Export your habits data to a CSV file for backup or transfer to another device. You can also import previously exported data.
settings.export_description: Export all your habits and their completion data to a CSV file. This file can be used as a backup or to transfer your data to another device.
settings.import_description: Import habits from a previously exported CSV file. This will add or update habits in your current collection.

review_request.subtitle: To help us reach more people who need help building habits, give HabitForm a 5-stars review
review_request.title: Loved HabitForm?

pro_features.title: Pro Features
pro_features.subtitle: See everything you can unlock with Pro
pro_features.description: Discover premium tools designed to help you stay consistent, protect your data, and build lasting habits faster.

chart_labels.demo_data_message: This is demo data, upgrade to unlock real data

statistics.formation_info: The percentage above shows how likely your habit is to become automatic based on your current consistency. Higher percentages mean your habit is more likely to stick. According to research, it takes an average of 66 days of regular practice for a habit to become automatic.
statistics.no_data_description: You'll see detailed statistics here when you start tracking your habits.

probability_status.early: You're still in the early stages. Keep tracking your habit consistently to see meaningful probability progress.
probability_status.excellent: Outstanding progress! With a {percentage}% completion rate, your habit is very likely to become automatic.
probability_status.good: Good progress! Your {percentage}% completion rate shows you're building this habit successfully.
probability_status.improving: You're making progress. Try to increase your completion rate to make habit probability more likely.
probability_status.needs_work: Keep working on consistency. Regular completion will help this habit become automatic.
probability_status.very_good: Great consistency! With a {percentage}% completion rate, your habit probability is on track.

probability_time.completed_good: Great job! You've completed the probability period with a {percentage}% completion rate. Your habit is likely established.
probability_time.completed_needs_work: You've completed the probability period. Continue with regular practice to strengthen your habit.
probability_time.completed_successful: Congratulations! Your habit is most likely established and automatic.
probability_time.not_enough_data: Keep tracking your habit to see probability progress.
probability_time.remaining_days: Estimated {days} days left in the probability period. Keep up the consistent practice.
